buildCommand: cd frontend && pnpm install && pnpm build
installCommand: cd backend && pip install -e apps/api && pip install -e packages/database -e packages/core -e packages/rss -e packages/vector && pip install fastapi uvicorn pydantic-settings python-jose passlib httpx structlog loguru arq mcp[cli] sqlalchemy asyncpg alembic feedparser beautifulsoup4 lxml python-multipart
